name: sage
description: Sage — Framework for Orchestrated, Resilient, Governed Engineering. Adaptive AI-driven development: FIX (minutes), BUILD (hours), ARCHITECT (days).

commands.name: sage:fix
commands.description: FIX mode — debug and fix a bug with TDD discipline. Light and fast.

commands.name: sage:build
commands.description: BUILD mode — guided specification + plan + disciplined task-by-task execution.

commands.name: sage:architect
commands.description: ARCHITECT mode — full planning team, architecture, stories, sprint execution.

commands.name: sage:review
commands.description: Run quality gates on recent changes without a full workflow.

commands.name: sage:debug
commands.description: Systematic 4-phase debugging on a specific issue.

commands.name: sage:rescue
commands.description: Legacy code rescue — autopsy, characterization tests, incremental refactoring.

commands.name: sage:status
commands.description: Show current mode, progress, installed extensions, and module registry.

commands.name: sage:help
commands.description: Show available commands and recommend what to do next based on project state.
